case_title: SEBASTIAN DIAZ VS. STEWART BERNARD PERRILLIAT

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,499.54 FILED BY DIAZ, SEBASTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT PERRILLIAT, STEWART BERNARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ, SEBASTIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERRILLIAT, STEWART BERNARD $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,885.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
